product_overview: A small Next.js frontend with authentication, an admin dashboard for managing resources, and site forms (contact). This PRD focuses on the user flows for login, admin content management, and contact form interactions to guide testing and implementation.
core_goals: Provide a secure email/password login flow for admins that redirects to the admin dashboard on success.
Allow authenticated admins to view, add, edit, and delete resources from the /admin dashboard.
Support a working contact form (name, email, message) with client-side validation and successful submission feedback.
Enable comprehensive form/test coverage across the app (login, contact, admin forms) to catch validation and auth errors.

features.name: User Login
features.description: Allow users (admins) to authenticate with email and password and access the protected admin dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Login button to submit -> Navigate to /admin on success
Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field with invalid credentials -> Click Login button to submit -> See error message on invalid credentials -> Remain on /login

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Authenticated admin interface to view, add, edit, and delete content resources (testimonials, services, etc.).
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Login button to submit -> Navigate to /admin on success -> View list of resources -> Click Add new resource -> Fill required fields for resource -> Click Save -> See new resource in list
Navigate to /admin -> Get redirected to /login -> See login prompt
Navigate to /admin -> View list of resources -> Click Add new resource -> Leave required fields empty -> Click Save -> See validation error -> Resource not created
Navigate to /admin -> View list of resources -> Click Edit on a resource -> Modify fields -> Click Save -> See updated resource in list
Navigate to /admin -> View list of resources -> Click Delete on a resource -> Confirm deletion -> See resource removed from list

features.name: Contact Form
features.description: Public contact form where visitors can send a message (name, email, message) from /contact.
user_flows: Navigate to /contact -> Fill name field -> Fill email field -> Fill message field -> Submit form -> See success confirmation
Navigate to /contact -> Fill name field -> Fill email field with invalid email -> Fill message field -> Submit form -> See validation error for email field -> Remain on /contact
Navigate to /contact -> Fill email field -> Leave name field empty -> Fill message field -> Submit form -> See validation error for name field -> Remain on /contact

features.name: Forms Test Suite (end-to-end form tests)
features.description: A coordinated set of tests that exercise all forms in the app (auth/login, contact, admin add/edit forms) to validate happy paths and common error states.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click link to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Login button to submit -> Navigate to /admin on success -> View list of resources -> Click Edit on first resource -> Modify a field -> Click Save -> See updated resource in list -> Navigate to /contact -> Fill name field -> Fill email field -> Fill message field -> Submit form -> See success confirmation
Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field with invalid credentials -> Click Login button to submit -> See error message on invalid credentials
Navigate to /contact -> Fill name field -> Fill email field with invalid email -> Fill message field -> Submit form -> See validation error for email field

routes.description: Home page featuring services and testimonials

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with email and password credentials
user_interactions: See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Manage content like testimonials and services
